questions.question: In Nuxt, how does directory structure affect auto-imported component names?
options: All components are registered with their filename only, regardless of folder
The folder path becomes a prefix (e.g., base/Button.vue becomes <BaseButton />)
Components are named using the full path with slashes replaced by dashes
Sub-folder names are ignored: only the filename matters

questions.question: How do you lazy-load an auto-imported component in Nuxt?
options: Import it with defineAsyncComponent() in the script setup
Add it to the lazyComponents array in nuxt.config.ts
Prefix its name with 'Lazy' in the template (e.g., <LazyHeavyChart />)
Set lazy: true in the component's defineOptions
